title: Mystery Letter Bag
description: A sound-to-letter phonics game where kids hear a letter sound from the mystery bag and tap the matching letter tile.
learningGoals: Map spoken letter sounds to printed letter forms
Practice tricky sound contrasts such as b/p, m/n, and c/g
interactionModel: choose-one tap a letter tile after a spoken sound clue
feedbackModel: Correct tiles get sparkle SFX and spoken praise; misses wiggle gently, get a spoken nudge, and replay the sound clue.

modes.title: What's in the Bag?
modes.skill: sound-to-letter mapping for b, s, m, t, c, and p

credits: Shared QLOBE Kids letter-tile art; emoji placeholder bag art. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
